{"voices":[{"id":"5","voice":"male-qn-jingying","desc":"生动解说"},{"id":"6","voice":"hutong_daye","desc":"北京小伙"},{"id":"7","voice":"audiobook_female_2","desc":"新闻主播"},{"id":"8","voice":"audiobook_male_1","desc":"磁性男声"},{"id":"1","voice":"zhubo","desc":"青年主播(已下线)"},{"id":"2","voice":"db6","desc":"温柔女声(已下线)"},{"id":"3","voice":"db8","desc":"磁性男声(已下线)"},{"id":"4","voice":"jieshuonannew","desc":"解说男声(已下线)"}],"script_max":"10000","models":[{"id":"10","desc":"Index"}],"export_annotation":false,"user_material_max":"200","audio_script_max":"50000","content_markup_multiple":"3","default_script":"「花生」可以做高大上的科普视频。比如，种花生要注意什么？花生是喜温作物，适宜生长在温暖湿润、排水性好的沙质壤土中，土壤酸碱度以中性为宜。它对光照和温度要求较高，生长期需要充足光照，日均气温保持在20℃以上更利于生长发育。全球核心种植区集中在北半球温带及亚热带地区，我国山东、河南、河北是主要产区，产量占全国多数，所产花生颗粒饱满、含油率高。此外，美国东南部、印度、阿根廷等国也广泛栽培。「花生」也可以讲历史。比如，花生的原产地在什么地方？花生原产于南美洲，16世纪明代中晚期经海路传入中国，福建、广东为最早引种地。小花生因耐贫瘠、适应性强，先在东南沿海扎根，清代向北推广至山东、河南等产区。明代已有煮食、炒制吃法，清代吃法更丰富，19世纪中后期大花生成为主流，花生油走入寻常百姓家，四百年间从闲食变为餐桌必备食材。「花生」还能聊聊商业财经上的财富密码。比如，中国作为全球花生产量、消费、进口三料冠军，2024年产量近1900万吨，占全球38%，年产值稳稳站上千亿级别。全球贸易中，中国既是73.4万吨的出口大户，也是151万吨的进口主力，从原料到深加工产品形成完整产业链。消费升级下，高端食用油、健康零食持续扩容，这颗小花生正撬动大市场。「花生」是一个输入文案或口播帮你自动找素材、剪辑成片的工具。不管你是喜欢用键盘噼里啪啦敲出灵感的文字大佬，还是更爱用语音滔滔不绝表达的话痨选手，都能在花生这儿找到最丝滑的创作体验。「花生」还有超多隐藏玩法等着各位解锁！赶紧去探索吧~","default_voice_id":6036542,"report_tag":[{"cat_name":"风险","tags":[{"tid":"1","name":"敏感人物或物品","is_show_more":false,"show_more_must":false,"detail":""},{"tid":"2","name":"违法违规","is_show_more":false,"show_more_must":false,"detail":""},{"tid":"3","name":"色情低俗","is_show_more":false,"show_more_must":false,"detail":""},{"tid":"4","name":"引人不适","is_show_more":false,"show_more_must":false,"detail":"恶心、暴力等"},{"tid":"5","name":"侵权","is_show_more":true,"show_more_must":false,"detail":"著作权、肖像权等"}]},{"cat_name":"匹配","tags":[{"tid":"6","name":"重复出现","is_show_more":false,"show_more_must":false,"detail":""},{"tid":"7","name":"素材画风突兀","is_show_more":false,"show_more_must":false,"detail":""},{"tid":"8","name":"不相关","is_show_more":false,"show_more_must":false,"detail":""}]},{"cat_name":"更多","tags":[{"tid":"9","name":"不清晰","is_show_more":false,"show_more_must":false,"detail":""},{"tid":"10","name":"有水印或字幕","is_show_more":false,"show_more_must":false,"detail":""},{"tid":"11","name":"黑边","is_show_more":false,"show_more_must":false,"detail":""},{"tid":"12","name":"其他","is_show_more":true,"show_more_must":true,"detail":""}]}],"tts_speed_switch":true}

resp_body: {"materials":[{"id":"5866096","name":" 休闲学姐","cover":"http://i0.hdslb.com/bfs/creative/7c25d0bfc58cb4df61630d4a226b6ea3494ab6ba.png","download_url":"","extra":"{\"voice_type\":2,\"voice\":\"Podcast_girl_platform\",\"speech_rate\":12,\"sample_rate\":0,\"pitch_rate\":0,\"volume\":40,\"raw_data\":\"古希腊文明始终笼罩着神秘面纱，从荷马史诗到德尔斐神谕，从雅典卫城到特洛伊战争，这个民族仍以其传奇色彩吸引着世人探寻。\"}","state":0,"rank":"1","material_type":"27","tags":"","biz_from":"10","up_from":"0","ctime":"1732525033","mtime":"1763627040","cat_id":"1740253","op_tag":"","apply_for":"1","show_cnt":"0","apply_biz":"0","template_from":"0","pool_extra":"{\"tts_tags\":\"冷静深沉\",\"preview_url\":\"http://boss.hdslb.com/material/e445ecfa-bc04-4041-9abb-285d684c36ed.wav\",\"outter_model\":\"speech-01-hd\"}","sdk_tag":false,"pool_rank":"3"},{"id":"6036548","name":"元气妹妹","cover":"http://i0.hdslb.com/bfs/creative/85214d6493bf2ecccf09daae70c5fb16425bcde6.png","download_url":"","extra":"{\"voice_type\":2,\"voice\":\"ai_dj_f_01\",\"speech_rate\":12,\"sample_rate\":0,\"pitch_rate\":0,\"volume\":30,\"raw_data\":\"牛奶中富含的乳铁蛋白，与母乳中的乳铁蛋白具有相同功效，能促进铁吸收和增强免疫力。\"}","state":0,"rank":"10","material_type":"27","tags":"","biz_from":"10","up_from":"0","ctime":"1763471520","mtime":"1764318859","cat_id":"1740253","op_tag":"","apply_for":"1","show_cnt":"0","apply_biz":"0","template_from":"0","pool_extra":"{\"tts_tags\":\"如沐春风\",\"preview_url\":\"http://boss.hdslb.com/material/0acecbd2-4a8b-492b-820b-859751ca3dec.wav\",\"outter_model\":\"speech-01-hd\"}","sdk_tag":false,"pool_rank":"5"},{"id":"6036551","name":"职场精英","cover":"http://i0.hdslb.com/bfs/creative/6232337e61f1ab876611c8bf0f920ef4e65767c2.png","download_url":"","extra":"{\"voice_type\":2,\"voice\":\"xumin0825_speech02\",\"speech_rate\":12,\"sample_rate\":0,\"pitch_rate\":0,\"volume\":30,\"raw_data\":\"中国移动支付仅用十年，就以惊人的普及效率和技术突破，彻底颠覆了全球金融交易方式。其成就不仅是金融科技史上的速度神话，更是无法复制的时代标杆。\"}","state":0,"rank":"3","material_type":"27","tags":"","biz_from":"10","up_from":"0","ctime":"1763471873","mtime":"1763715151","cat_id":"1740253","op_tag":"","apply_for":"1","show_cnt":"0","apply_biz":"0","template_from":"0","pool_extra":"{\"tts_tags\":\"掷地有声\",\"preview_url\":\"http://boss.hdslb.com/material/ef4b4f28-a113-4fc6-b3aa-f2f1116bc617.wav\",\"outter_model\":\"speech-01-hd\"}","sdk_tag":false,"pool_rank":"7"},{"id":"6036547","name":"清甜少女","cover":"http://i0.hdslb.com/bfs/creative/3e1c52c6eaf96f915cb5fa42374cf5ab555e4808.png","download_url":"","extra":"{\"voice_type\":2,\"voice\":\"dj_f_0921_speech02\",\"speech_rate\":12,\"sample_rate\":0,\"pitch_rate\":0,\"volume\":30,\"raw_data\":\"1953年上映的《罗马假日》以其浪漫动人的爱情故事将罗马这座城市的独特风貌与浪漫氛围展现得淋漓尽致，堪称是罗马的一张浪漫名片。\"}","state":0,"rank":"6","material_type":"27","tags":"","biz_from":"10","up_from":"0","ctime":"1763471375","mtime":"1764318859","cat_id":"1740253","op_tag":"","apply_for":"1","show_cnt":"0","apply_biz":"0","template_from":"0","pool_extra":"{\"tts_tags\":\"恬静治愈\",\"preview_url\":\"http://boss.hdslb.com/material/2668e541-68dc-4d10-b10d-b199f6504177.wav\",\"outter_mo
